{{< include /_macros.qmd >}}

# Linear Attention and Recurrence {#sec-linear-attention-recurrence}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## In this chapter
<!-- The deep duality: softmax attention, linear attention, and RNNs are
     three views of one idea. Removing the softmax buys recurrence. -->
:::

**Learning objectives.**

<!-- TODO -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Dropping the softmax

<!-- Kernelized/linear attention: replace exp(qk) with a feature map so the
     sum reassociates into a running state. -->

## Attention as a recurrence

<!-- The equivalence: linear attention has an O(1)-per-step recurrent form.
     Bridges @sec-attention and @sec-state-space-mamba. -->

## The unifying picture

<!-- A single table: softmax attention / linear attention / SSMs / RNNs, and
     what each trades. -->

## Exercises {.unnumbered}

<!-- TODO -->

## Further reading {.unnumbered}
